text: Castlelake increases proposal to 650p per share, rejected by Board. PUSU deadline extended to 5 July 2026.
£659m recommended formal offer by H.B. Fuller
Toscafund's PUSU deadline extended to 9 July 2026
Shareholders overwhelmingly approve scheme, which is still subject to regulatory conditions.
Providence Equity Partners confirms that it is no longer part of the Consortium and that it does not intend to make an offer for Gamma. Epiris is considering its options.
Unsolicited indicative proposal of 0.084 new Prologis shares for every SEGRO share with an implied price of 925p per share.
Ratio Petroleum Energy LP makes recommended cash offer of 23.07p per share plus 4p special dividend (scheme of arrangement).
